reason: Node 1.3.1 is labeled as inference type 'assumption', but it is not introducing an assumption. It is a verification/checking step -- it argues that certain hypotheses hold. A more appropriate inference type would be 'verification' or 'deduction', since the node is deducing that the conditions of Nodes 1.1 and 1.2 are satisfied from the setup of the main theorem. The 'assumption' label suggests this node is positing something without proof, when in fact it is (or should be) arguing for something.
